src: A sleek, metallic copper sports car with sharp, angular headlights and a large black honeycomb grille. The car features a low-profile body and silver alloy wheels, highlighted by polished curves.
edit: A classic two-toned vintage automobile with a cream and burgundy color scheme. The vehicle boasts round headlights, chrome accents, a graceful, elongated hood, and silver-finished wheels reflecting a retro elegance.

per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-55BRE27Odjs-unsplash: The object is positioned at the side of a paved road, surrounded by wild grasses. A modern building with large windows and grey walls contrasts with the natural landscape.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-6Hqh2B8dpuo-unsplash: The object is parked centrally on a wide sidewalk. Tall trees and pruned shrubs flank a modern brick building, which offers a symmetrical urban backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-B2Sv3FpTLng-unsplash: The object stands centered in a rooftop parking area. An expansive view of a modern glass structure reflects the diminishing sunlight, adding an industrial feel.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-MQfA25aBlss-unsplash: The object is shown partially, focusing on the front side. The parking area and a modern glass building silhouette in the setting sun create a futuristic environment.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-S0q7CvqX6O4-unsplash: The object is positioned under a metallic carwash roof. Sturdy metallic beams and clean lines frame the industrial backdrop, contrasting with the concrete floor.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-SgaZShRdlDY-unsplash: The object is placed centrally on a city street, bordered by green lawns. Leafless trees and a modern office building with large windows create a contemporary urban setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-Ycjt4brRK04-unsplash: The object is angled toward the viewer, parked on a modern street. A multi-story building with an array of large windows and geometric lines forms a sleek, urban backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-ZFqqglZzmYc-unsplash: The object is parked beside a road with a red-brick building behind. Trimmed trees and manicured green bushes blend with modern architectural lines in the scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-b94ZlRW9VTU-unsplash: The object is positioned in a rooftop parking lot dramatically lit by a low sunset. A vast sky and distant buildings balance the open, modern architectural environment.

per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-55BRE27Odjs-unsplash: The object is positioned at the side of a cobblestone road, surrounded by trimmed hedges. A vintage building with wooden window frames and stone walls complements the classic landscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-6Hqh2B8dpuo-unsplash: The object is parked on a vintage cobblestone square. Tall street lamps and pruned topiaries flank an old brick building, offering a charming vintage backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-B2Sv3FpTLng-unsplash: The object stands centered in a rooftop parking area. An expansive view of a vintage glass conservatory reflects the soft sunset, adding a retro feel.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-MQfA25aBlss-unsplash: The object is shown partially, focusing on the front side. The parking area and an old glass greenhouse silhouette in the setting sun create a nostalgic environment.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-S0q7CvqX6O4-unsplash: The object is positioned under a wooden gazebo roof. Sturdy wooden beams and aged textures frame the vintage backdrop, contrasting with the stone floor.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-SgaZShRdlDY-unsplash: The object is placed centrally on a cobbled street, bordered by grass lawns. Bare trees and an old office building with wooden window frames create a vintage urban setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-Ycjt4brRK04-unsplash: The object is angled toward the viewer, parked on a classic street. A multi-story building with vintage windows and ornate lines forms a charming, retro backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-ZFqqglZzmYc-unsplash: The object is parked beside a lane with a red-brick vintage building behind. Trimmed trees and manicured green bushes blend with the traditional architectural lines in the scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-b94ZlRW9VTU-unsplash: The object is positioned in a rooftop parking lot romantically lit by a low sunset. A vast sky and distant buildings balance the open, classic architectural environment.
